properties.name: Ouchies
properties.description: Start sitting and pull over the lip up and right.

properties.name: Rainbow Crack
properties.description: Optional. Climb the easy crack and walk down to Forestland parking.

properties.name: Slice of Cake
properties.description: Start on two high edges and make an initial hard move up and right on bad feet. Work up the seam and do a big pull to a flake.

properties.name: Kobra Khan
properties.description: Start with a good left-hand sidepull and a high, poor right-hand edge.

properties.name: Coffee Cup
properties.description: Start matched on the right side of the rail.

properties.name: The Practitioner
properties.description: Start in underclings under the roof.

properties.name: The Shallow
properties.description: Climb the tall face. Highball.

properties.name: The Rail
properties.description: Sit start. Continue traversing left before topping out for some extra climbing.

properties.name: Cube Crack
properties.description: Climb the tall crack. Highball.

properties.name: The Cube
properties.description: Work up crimps to a committing move to a jug. Highball.

properties.name: Frosting
properties.description: Climb up and right on the left arete.

properties.name: Calcite
properties.description: Start on the low edge and climb through crimps to calcite jug then up to top out right.

properties.name: Pentaphobia
properties.description: Start on any of the crimps and climb the sequential face.

properties.name: Rainbow
properties.description: Climb up and right on the steep side of the fin. Downclimb on the slabby side.

properties.name: Slice of Tea
properties.description: Start between the boulders behind Pentaphobia and climb jugs out of the hole.

properties.name: Gandalf
properties.description: Start by laying back the central arete and then pull into the dihedral and work your way left to top out.

properties.name: The Goods
properties.description: Start from high edges on the right and traverse to the top of Crimp, Crimp.

properties.name: Breadline
properties.description: Climb straight up or go out to the sloper and top out left.

properties.name: Crimp, Crimp, Slab, Throw
properties.description: Start on the two flat edges.

properties.name: Concavity Stand
properties.description: Start in the crack and climb up and left. Or start on the sidepull left of the crack and climb straight up, eliminating the crack.

properties.name: Funny and Cheap
properties.description: Start as for Sunny and Steep but climb right through underclings then up.

properties.name: Power Steering
properties.description: Sit start.

properties.name: The Physical
properties.description: Reach high off the slab and pull into compression.

properties.name: Toto
properties.description: Sit start.

properties.name: Arrested Development
properties.description: Stand start and compress your way up and right. Trickier than it looks.

properties.name: One Summer
properties.description: Start standing on crimps and lunge to the good Breadline ledge. The crouch start adds a grade.

properties.name: Portal Crack
properties.description: Leads to the top of Moondog and Bad Moon Rising.

properties.name: Redneck
properties.description: Short slab.

properties.name: Squeezer
properties.description: Stand start from the sidepull crimp.

properties.name: Bad Moon Rising
properties.description: Excellent technical slab with a committing move up high.

properties.name: Alcove Center
properties.description: Start crouched on the big ledge and climb up to the jug and then top out up and left.

properties.name: The Hesitator
properties.description: Climb the tall slab with a probable moment of hesitation near the top.

properties.name: Dirty and Deep
properties.description: Climb the low angle right arete.

properties.name: Chunky
properties.description: Traverse from a low undercling to the right with a final hard move down to the finish edge/jug.

properties.name: Slice of Pie
properties.description: Amazing boulder with a scary landing. Committing move up high.

properties.name: Sunny and Steep
properties.description: Climb the left side of the face on rounded jugs. Sit start.

properties.name: Toprope Slab
properties.description: Start just left of central blunt arete and work up and left to the left edge of the boulder.

properties.name: Cleaver Crack
properties.description: Start standing and climb the crack.

properties.name: Alfalfa or Spanky
properties.description: Start on the head high edge and climb the dihedral.

properties.name: The Hobbit
properties.description: Sit start.

properties.name: Elfen Magic
properties.description: Start in the middle of the slab with a good foothold and climb straight up.

properties.name: Bowl Weevil
properties.description: Start on the two edges in the overhang pull to the lip and top out.

properties.name: Cornucopia
properties.description: Start on head high jug and climb the arete up and left.

properties.name: Terminal Traverse
properties.description: Start where the lip is incut and traverse, mantling as for Playback.

properties.name: Playback
properties.description: Reach high to start with right in the crack and left on the face. Pad stacking to start helps.

properties.name: Tron
properties.description: Downclimb on the the other side of the tree.

properties.name: Trail Mix
properties.description: Climb the center of the slab through some high and committing moves.

properties.name: The Firefly
properties.description: Climb the short arete

properties.name: Dog Log
properties.description: Climb friable edges from a high right-leaning crimp rail.

properties.name: The Kiddie Pool
properties.description: Start on the right side of a sloping ledge and traverse left to the tree. Drop and continue onto the next boulder or mantle and climb easy face above.

properties.name: Toprope Tough Guys
properties.description: Tall easy face on downhill side of the Amphitheater boulder.

properties.name: Winterbottom Arete
properties.description: Start crouching and slap up arete.

properties.name: Crank
properties.description: Climb the crack.

properties.name: The Ampitheater
properties.description: Start on the two chest-high pods on the right side of the face. Climb straight up using a tiny crimp.

properties.name: Spongebob Squarepad
properties.description: Start standing and slap and squeeze up the arete. The sit adds a few grades.

properties.name: The Octopus
properties.description: Start in the cool hueco and climb up juggy crack.

properties.name: Foot Fumpkin
properties.description: Start with the tufa huecos in the deepest part of the cave, climbing through and out the 3D roof.

properties.name: The Undercling
properties.description: Start in the big smooth heuco, climbing up into an undercling and topping out to the right.

properties.name: The Scoop
properties.description: Start sitting on the left and climb up and right.

properties.name: The Rail
properties.description: Start sitting with two low opposing sidepulls and a good heel hook.

properties.name: The Crack
properties.description: Crouch start on the blocky ledges and climb up and left, topping out in the V.

properties.name: Pruning Shears
properties.description: Climb right arete, topping out left of the apex.

properties.name: Madvillian
properties.description: Climb right arete, finishing just right of the nose on jugs.

properties.name: The Pocket
properties.description: Climb center of tall face on pockets and edges.

properties.name: Dr. Doom
properties.description: Start on the left arete but pull over, finishing up the right-facing crack.

properties.name: The Dish
properties.description: Climb center of short boulder on heucos.

properties.name: The Rudder
properties.description: On uphill side of The Sail boulder, climb the face on edges without the left arete.

properties.name: Barnacles
properties.description: Sit start on face striped with cracks behind the Sail. Climb up and right out of the chasm.

properties.name: Leopard Skin
properties.description: Start crouched at the bottom of a crack. Work up and right, and under a stacked boulder. The top can gather dirt and pine needles.

properties.name: Hueco Route
properties.description: Start sitting and climb through large huecos to last pocket. Bonus points for kicking feet out right and pushing up onto other boulder.

properties.name: Drugstore Cowboy
properties.description: Start sitting with two shallow pockets. Large foot ledge and boulder to the right are on.

properties.name: Lamb
properties.description: Tiny boulder behind Drugstore Cowboy. Start matched on the low flat edge. Finish straight up.

properties.name: Swordfish
properties.description: Tiny boulder behind Drugstore Cowboy. Start matched on the low flat edge. Finish straight up.

properties.name: Pocket Rocket
properties.description: Start matched on a decent crimp.

properties.name: Harry Spotter
properties.description: Climb up and right on left facing edges with a charred tree at your back.

properties.name: Squarepusher
properties.description: Climb the blocky arete from a sit start. The crux is a hard cross left to a jug.

properties.name: Heads Will Roll
properties.description: Optional if the water is low enough.

properties.name: Down the Barrel
properties.description: Optional if the water is low enough - could be a part of the official “Fall” version of the circuit

properties.name: Lonely Fish
properties.description: Use any means necessary to establish on the rail.

properties.name: Sorrow Bird
properties.description: Same start as Lonely Fish.

properties.name: Old School
properties.description: This one is tall but the hardest moves are low.

properties.name: Bok Choy
properties.description: Start with one had on the undercling.

properties.name: Ice Age Left
properties.description: Climb the left side of the arete - a lot easier than the original.

properties.name: Answer Man
properties.description: Sit start.

properties.name: Nasty Boy
properties.description: Climb right side of Bush Craft arete

properties.name: Batman
properties.description: The midday sun can make topping out this one feel a lot harder.

properties.name: Jump!
properties.description: Hop up to the sloper and mantle.

properties.name: Whelmed
properties.description: Start with a left hand high on a decent sidepull and right hand on a crimp.

properties.name: Bubbles No-Hands
properties.description: Climb the boulder with no hands!

properties.name: No Pitons Here No-Hands
properties.description: Climb the boulder with no hands!

properties.name: Flying Goat Boy
properties.description: Hop up to the sloper and mantle.

properties.name: Schist Lip
properties.description: Start sitting, rock over at the tree and continue diagonaling up or drop off.

properties.name: Squatter Variation
properties.description: Start with a high right hand on the arête and hop a foot up to the pimple.

properties.name: Red Traverse
properties.description: Traverse right, staying below the lip.

properties.name: Fin Traverse
properties.description: Start on the right side of the fin, shuffle to the left and then pull up to the main boulder, exiting near the top of The Pit.

properties.name: Lowe Rider Stand
properties.description: Traverse the detached flake, starting from a good left foot.

properties.name: Joel’s Slab
properties.description: Optional if you're up for it!

properties.name: Lead Pants
properties.description: Start sitting.

properties.name: Royal Flush
properties.description: Start deep in the cave.

properties.name: Footless Traverse
properties.description: An option hard and grand ending. Climb in 1 or 2 parts!
